events.text: Own Goal by Fernandinho, Brazil.  Brazil 0, Belgium 1.
Goal!  Brazil 0, Belgium 2. Kevin De Bruyne (Belgium) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Romelu Lukaku.
Toby Alderweireld (Belgium) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Thomas Meunier (Belgium) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Brazil 1, Belgium 2. Renato Augusto (Brazil) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Philippe Coutinho with a through ball.
Fernandinho (Brazil) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Fágner (Brazil) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
